nasb.text: “And when you are praying, do not use meaningless repetition as the Gentiles do, for they suppose that they will be heard for their many words.

esv.text: “And when you pray, do not heap up empty phrases as     the Gentiles do, for     they think that they will be heard     for their many words.

cnv.text: 你們祈禱的時候，不可重複無意義的話，像教外人一樣，他們以為話多了就蒙垂聽。

ccb.text: “你们祷告时不可像外族人那样喋喋不休，他们以为长篇大论，就必蒙上帝垂听。

csbs.text: 你们祷告的时候，不要像外邦人那样，重复无意义的话。他们以为话多了就蒙垂听。
